message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Activity

participant "BaseMediaActivity" as BMA
participant "MediaActivity" as MA

Activity -> BMA: onCreate
activate BMA
BMA -> BMA: set theme
BMA -> BMA: setup navigation drawer

alt [new activity]
    BMA -> MA: getActionBarTitle()
    activate MA
    MA --> BMA
    deactivate MA
    note right of BMA: set home icon to hamburger icon
else [restore action bar]
    note right of BMA: get home icon and action bar title\nfrom saved instance
end

BMA -> BMA: updateActionBar

alt [no fragment in layout (new activity)]
    BMA -> MA: createFragment()
    activate MA
    MA --> BMA
    deactivate MA
    BMA -> BMA: add fragment
end

deactivate BMA

Activity -> BMA: onCreateOptionsMenu
activate BMA
note right of BMA: inflate generic menu items
BMA --> Activity
deactivate BMA

note right of MA: user selects media item
MA -> BMA: showFragment()
activate BMA
note right of BMA: sets up the shared element transition\nand updates the dataholder
BMA -> BMA: replace current fragment\nwith new fragment
deactivate BMA

@enduml
```
